project_type: Python HF trading bot + MQL5 EA (XAUUSD momentum scalper)
test_framework: pytest with tests/ directory, test files: test_main_logic.py, test_momentum.py, test_tick_collector.py, test_bridge.py
verification_instructions: Run pytest tests/ -v --ignore=tests/test_tick_collector.py (tick_collector tests have pre-existing UTF-16 encoding failures unrelated to this task). All 51+ tests must pass.
environment_constraints: No MT5 terminal available for live testing. Validate via unit tests and AST/import checks only.
contribution_requirements: Commit to neurox-v9-release branch. Do NOT push.
key_patterns: Config class in config.py holds all constants. main.py has global state variables and filter functions (can_trade, has_capacity, passes_hysteresis, fire_signal). tick_collector.py has TickCollector class with _tick_prices deque. momentum.py has compute_atr and compute_momentum. Bridge writes signals as CSV dicts with action, regime, entry_type fields. Tests use pytest fixtures, reset global state via autouse fixtures.
directory_structure: Root: config.py, main.py, momentum.py, tick_collector.py, bridge.py, trailing_stop.py, NeuroX_EA_v9.mq5. Include/: MQL5 header files. tests/: pytest test files.
